## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run check` passes locally
- [ ] [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) updated under `## [Unreleased]` (user-facing changes)
- [ ] README or docs updated if CLI flags, env vars, or report shape changed

### Accessibility (if this PR touches `site/`, terminal output, or docs)

- [ ] Read [ACCESSIBILITY.md](../ACCESSIBILITY.md)
- [ ] `bun run a11y` passes (site changes)
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works on changed interactive controls
- [ ] Focus indicators remain visible (`:focus-visible`)
- [ ] Status is not conveyed by color alone (CLI uses text labels; site uses words + color)
- [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion` respected for new animations
- [ ] Images and diagrams have alt text or transcripts where applicable
